---
output:
  reprex::reprex_document:
    venue: "gh"
    advertise: FALSE
    session_info: TRUE
    style: TRUE
    comment: "#;-)"
    tidyverse_quiet: FALSE
    std_out_err: TRUE
knit: reprex::reprex_render
---

```{r}
# packages
library(fs)
library(arrow)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(fixest)

# ---- config
cwd  <- getwd()
path <- fs::path(cwd, "data", "raw", "blackwell_yamauchi")
folders <- dir_ls(path, type = "directory")

clip01 <- function(p, eps = 1e-6) pmax(eps, pmin(1 - eps, p))

df_results <- tibble(
  data_id     = character(),
  N = integer(), T = integer(), rho = integer(),
  a = numeric(), p = integer(),
  tau_f_true  = numeric(), tau_c_true = numeric(),
  tau_f_fe    = numeric(), tau_c_fe   = numeric(),
  tau_f_no_fe = numeric(), tau_c_no_fe = numeric()
)

for (num in seq_along(folders)) {
  data_id_folder <- basename(folders[num])
  cat(sprintf("Processing %d/%d: %s\n", num, length(folders), data_id_folder))

  # ---- load data
  df_path          <- fs::path(folders[num], "data.parquet")
  df_manifest_path <- fs::path(folders[num], "manifest.json")
  df_manifest      <- jsonlite::fromJSON(df_manifest_path)
  df               <- arrow::read_parquet(df_path) |> as.data.frame()

  # split file (relative to cwd)
  splits_path <- fs::path(cwd, df_manifest$split_file)
  splits      <- jsonlite::fromJSON(splits_path)
  train_split <- splits$train_ids
  N           <- length(train_split)

  T_val <- df_manifest$params$T
  rho   <- as.integer(N / T_val)

  # ---- PREP: keep ALL train units (do NOT drop monotone)  ← change #1
  df_fe <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(patient_id %in% train_split) |>
    dplyr::arrange(patient_id, t)

  # identify variable-treatment units for FE only
  tmp <- df_fe |>
    group_by(patient_id) |>
    summarise(meanD = mean(D), .groups="drop")
  var_pids <- tmp$patient_id[!(tmp$meanD %in% c(0,1))]

  T_final <- max(df_fe$t)
  mask_last4 <- df_fe$t >= (T_final - 3) & df_fe$t <= T_final

  # MSM regressors at final time: Y_T ~ D_T + (lag1+lag2+lag3)_T
  if (!all(c("lag1_D","lag2_D","lag3_D") %in% names(df_fe))) {
    df_fe <- df_fe |>
      arrange(patient_id, t) |>
      group_by(patient_id) |>
      mutate(
        lag1_D = dplyr::lag(D, 1, default = 0),
        lag2_D = dplyr::lag(D, 2, default = 0),
        lag3_D = dplyr::lag(D, 3, default = 0)
      ) |>
      ungroup()
  }
  df_fe$lag_sum3 <- df_fe$lag1_D + df_fe$lag2_D + df_fe$lag3_D
  df_msm <- df_fe |> dplyr::filter(t == T_final)

  # ---- propensity models (numerator is common; denominators differ)
  # numerator (stabilized): D_t ~ lag1_D
  num_mod <- glm(D ~ lag1_D, data = df_fe, family = binomial())
  p_num   <- clip01(predict(num_mod, type = "response"))

  # denominator NO-FE: D_t ~ lag1_D + X_t
  x_cols <- grep("^x", names(df_fe), value = TRUE)
  f_no   <- reformulate(termlabels = c("lag1_D", x_cols), response = "D")
  den_no <- glm(f_no, data = df_fe, family = binomial())
  p_no   <- clip01(predict(den_no, type = "response"))

  # denominator FE: fit ONLY on variable-treatment units
  df_fe_FE <- df_fe[df_fe$patient_id %in% var_pids, , drop=FALSE]
  rhs      <- paste(c("lag1_D", x_cols), collapse = " + ")
  den_fe   <- fixest::feglm(as.formula(paste0("D ~ ", rhs, " | patient_id")),
                            data = df_fe_FE, family = binomial())
  p_fe     <- clip01(predict(den_fe, type = "response"))

  # (optional) true p from generator if available
  p_true <- if ("p_true" %in% names(df_fe)) clip01(df_fe$p_true) else NA_real_

  # ---- per-period stabilized weights
  per_period_w <- function(p_num, p_den, D) ifelse(D == 1, p_num/p_den, (1 - p_num)/(1 - p_den))

  # TRUE/no-FE on FULL df_fe
  w_true_it <- if (all(!is.na(p_true))) per_period_w(p_num, p_true, df_fe$D) else rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_fe))
  w_no_it   <- per_period_w(p_num, p_no,   df_fe$D)

  # FE weights on FE sample only
  p_num_FE  <- p_num[df_fe$patient_id %in% var_pids]
  w_fe_it   <- per_period_w(p_num_FE, p_fe, df_fe_FE$D)

  # ---- product over the last 4 periods, per patient
  last4_prod <- function(ids, w, mask) {
    data.frame(patient_id = ids[mask], w = w[mask]) |>
      aggregate(w ~ patient_id, data = _, FUN = prod)
  }

  W_true_tbl <- if (all(!is.na(w_true_it))) last4_prod(df_fe$patient_id, w_true_it, mask_last4) else
                  data.frame(patient_id = df_msm$patient_id, w = NA_real_)
  W_no_tbl   <- last4_prod(df_fe$patient_id,   w_no_it,   mask_last4)

  mask_last4_FE <- df_fe_FE$t >= (T_final - 3) & df_fe_FE$t <= T_final
  W_fe_tbl      <- last4_prod(df_fe_FE$patient_id, w_fe_it, mask_last4_FE)

  # ---- align weights with final-time rows using match()  ← change #2
  df_msm$patient_id     <- as.character(df_msm$patient_id)
  W_true_tbl$patient_id <- as.character(W_true_tbl$patient_id)
  W_no_tbl$patient_id   <- as.character(W_no_tbl$patient_id)
  W_fe_tbl$patient_id   <- as.character(W_fe_tbl$patient_id)

  w_true <- if (all(!is.na(w_true_it))) W_true_tbl$w[ match(df_msm$patient_id, W_true_tbl$patient_id) ]
            else rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_msm))
  w_no   <- W_no_tbl$w  [ match(df_msm$patient_id, W_no_tbl$patient_id) ]

  df_msm_FE <- df_msm[df_msm$patient_id %in% var_pids, , drop=FALSE]
  w_fe      <- W_fe_tbl$w[ match(as.character(df_msm_FE$patient_id), W_fe_tbl$patient_id) ]

  # ---- weighted MSM fits
  fit_wls <- function(data, w) lm(Y ~ D + lag_sum3, data = data, weights = w)

  res_true <- if (all(!is.na(w_true))) fit_wls(df_msm, w_true) else NULL
  res_no   <- fit_wls(df_msm, w_no)
  res_fe   <- if (nrow(df_msm_FE) > 0) fit_wls(df_msm_FE, w_fe) else NULL

  tau_f_true <- if (!is.null(res_true)) coef(res_true)[["D"]] else NA_real_
  tau_c_true <- if (!is.null(res_true)) coef(res_true)[["lag_sum3"]] else NA_real_
  tau_f_no   <- coef(res_no)[["D"]]
  tau_c_no   <- coef(res_no)[["lag_sum3"]]
  tau_f_fe   <- if (!is.null(res_fe)) coef(res_fe)[["D"]] else NA_real_
  tau_c_fe   <- if (!is.null(res_fe)) coef(res_fe)[["lag_sum3"]] else NA_real_

  # ---- store results
  df_results <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    df_results,
    tibble(
      data_id = df_manifest$run_id,
      N = N, T = T_val, rho = rho,
      a = df_manifest$params$a, p = df_manifest$params$p,
      tau_f_true = tau_f_true, tau_c_true = tau_c_true,
      tau_f_fe = tau_f_fe,     tau_c_fe = tau_c_fe,
      tau_f_no_fe = tau_f_no,  tau_c_no_fe = tau_c_no
    )
  )
}

```

```{r}
write.csv(df_results, file = file.path(cwd, "results", "msm", "msm_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```
